summary: Phase 1 end-to-end testing of Career Copilot. Backend: 32/32 pytest cases passed against public preview URL (health, db-health, auth register/login/me/logout, recruitments list+detail+save, profile get/update, tracker CRUD, community categories+threads list+create+post+vote+admin_only rejection, marketplace lists+mentor detail, study plan+focus start/stop+mocks+subjects+weekly-review, accountability partners/groups/mentors book, AI guidance/chat/history, admin RBAC for super_admin incl. user create + role update, RBAC denies normal user). Frontend: landing, login, signup→onboarding, all 15 user sidebar routes render with no console errors, exam detail Save/Track works, focus Pomodoro starts and counts down, super admin routes to /admin with all 12 admin sidebar items, RBAC page shows users table + Invite admin/mentor button, normal user hitting /admin is redirected to /app, authed landing swaps Sign in/Get started for Open app, logout (token clear) redirects to /login. One real frontend bug found: ThreadDetail calls GET /api/community/{slug} instead of /api/community/threads/{slug} causing 404 and the page fails to render reply form + replies list.

ui_bugs.issue: Calls api.get(`/api/community/${slug}`) — backend route is /api/community/threads/{slug}. Result: 404 on every thread open, page stays on 'Loading…', reply form and existing posts never render. Confirmed via browser 404s ('PAGEERR: Not Found') and backend curl: GET /api/community/threads/ssc-cgl-2026-notification-released → 200, GET /api/community/ssc-cgl-2026-notification-released → 404.

integration_issues.issue: Reply form ([data-testid=reply-body]/reply-submit) never mounts because ThreadDetail.load() hits the wrong URL (see ui_bugs). Fixing the path to /api/community/threads/${slug} unblocks reply, vote and thread view.

action_items: Fix ThreadDetail.jsx line 15: change api.get(`/api/community/${slug}`) to api.get(`/api/community/threads/${slug}`). Everything else on /app/community and /app/community/new already works (list + sort + create thread all succeed).
critical_code_review_comments: ThreadDetail load() uses wrong endpoint — root cause of thread page blank (see action_items).

Backend schemas are strict (min body length 10, required fields on tracker + mocks + focus). That is fine, just something for frontend form validation to mirror so users see inline errors rather than 422s.
FocusStop expects field `id` (not `session_id`) and `completed_min`. If any UI timer ever calls /stop, double-check it sends those exact keys.
Seeded community slug `ssc-cgl-2026-notification-released` was the only non-test thread; broken thread-detail makes this invisible to users end-to-end.
/api/auth/me returns {user: {...}} wrapper; frontend already handles it via authContext refreshUser. Just document so future code doesn't assume flat shape.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — everything passes except thread-detail reply flow

test_credentials: Super Admin: superadmin@careercopilot.in / SuperAdmin@2026; Mentor: mentor@careercopilot.in / Mentor@2026; User: aspirant@careercopilot.in / Aspirant@2026 (all seeded idempotently on backend startup)
seed_data_creation: Tests created a few TEST_ prefixed users (register + admin/users/create), one TEST community thread in 'preparation' category, one tracker entry (deleted in same test), one focus session (stopped), one mock, and accountability bookings. No cleanup on seeded data beyond tracker delete — totals are small and prefixed with TEST so easy to sweep later.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid end-to-end; rerun /app/backend/tests/test_career_copilot.py for regression (32 tests, ~6s). Only outstanding fix is ThreadDetail.jsx endpoint. After the fix, re-run this playwright flow: login as aspirant → /app/community → click first thread → expect data-testid='reply-form' visible → fill data-testid='reply-body' with >0 chars → click data-testid='reply-submit' → the reply should render in the posts list and no PAGEERR: Not Found should appear in console. Also worth a smoke check of data-testid='vote-btn'.
rca of the issue: Frontend ThreadDetail fetches thread+posts from GET /api/community/{slug}. Backend exposes GET /api/community/threads/{slug}. Mismatch returns 404; component sets data to null and renders only 'Loading…'. Reproduction: login as aspirant → /app/community → click any thread → observe infinite 'Loading…' and two 404 PAGEERRs in console. Mitigation: change line 15 of /app/app/frontend/src/pages/ThreadDetail.jsx from `api.get(`/api/community/${slug}`)` to `api.get(`/api/community/threads/${slug}`)`. No backend change needed.
